questions.question: How many layers does the TCP/IP model have?
questions.explanation: The TCP/IP model has 4 layers: Application, Transport, Internet, and Network Access.

questions.question: Which protocol would you use for real-time video streaming?
questions.explanation: UDP is preferred for real-time streaming because it has lower latency. Occasional packet loss is acceptable for video/audio.

questions.question: What is the default port for HTTPS?
questions.explanation: HTTPS uses port 443 by default. HTTP uses port 80.

questions.question: In the TCP three-way handshake, what does the server send in response to SYN?
questions.explanation: The server responds with SYN-ACK, acknowledging the client's SYN and sending its own synchronization.
